text_content: RACI for Design & Development defines the roles and what key responsibilities each has in the development of Instructions for Use (where Instructions for Use is used generically for GPL-owned publication types). This UAP describes GPL-relevant organization and UA-specific organization where it is not included in the DDP/SDP (or when including it in the UAP facilitates project communication). The Library CD/DVD  included for some projects is not listed in this table, as it compiles the UA. Reviewers are subject-matter experts (SME) who are integral to product development. They contribute to content development via internal reviews of drafts, and through demos and discussions. Reviewers consult and contribute (C). Formal Reviewers participate in the Formal Review phase of documents. They do not sign approval. Formal reviewers consult and contribute (C). Stakeholders have interest in the project or deliverable but are not reviewers or approvers. Stakeholders consult and contribute (C).
